title: HARM REDUCTION/INJECTION SUPPLY PROGRAM - 211info
text: MID-WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SUPPORT NETWORK HARM REDUCTION/INJECTION SUPPLY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an injection and harm reduction supply and exchange program. Provides new needles/syringes for hormone replacement therapy and sharp containers and accepts full sharp containers for needle/syringe disposal. Also offers other safety and safe sex items like Narcan kits, fentanyl testing strips, band-aids, alcohol swabs, condoms (latex and non-latex), dental dams, lube, and HIV at-home test kits. 260 SW Madison Avenue Suite 110 Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as LGBTQ+ or gender diverse Hours: Sunday-Friday noon-5pm or by appointment Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete form or call to schedule appointment. Delivery or pick-up available. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday noon-5pm. By appointment only for any other days. Services: Harm Reduction Test Strip Distribution * LGBTQ2+ Individuals HIV Testing * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Safe Sex Supplies * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CASE MANAGEMENT AND RESOURCE DISPATCHING MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MID-WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SUPPORT NETWORK
